_publications._publicationTitle: Traditional and systems biology based drug discovery for the rare tumor syndrome neurofibromatosis type 2.

_contextSnippet: building an openly accessible ( www.synapse.org/SynodosNF2 ) database for community sharing and mining of drug treatment, transcriptome and kinome data from isogenic schwannoma and meningioma cell systems
details: Openly accessible database for community sharing and mining of drug treatment, transcriptome and kinome data from isogenic schwannoma and meningioma cell systems
